summary: REQ-1 appears implemented by updating global OKLCH theme typography tokens in frontend/src/index.css (including --foreground, --card-foreground, --popover-foreground, and --muted-foreground) for both :root (light) and .dark (dark). However, the diff also introduces changes unrelated to the request, including font-family changes (a stated non-goal) and updates to project metadata/summary files.

hallucinated_features.description: Changed global font family to Inter in html/body styles (typography font family change is a non-goal).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly lists changing font family as a non-goal; REQ-1 only asked for adjusting global theme color tokens for typography brightness.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated/added project tracking metadata in project_state.json.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by BuildRequest; REQ-1 only concerns CSS theme token adjustments in frontend/src/index.css.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt content describing various components/features.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by BuildRequest; REQ-1 is limited to theme token changes in frontend/src/index.css.
